notes: formatBCE HA variant: XVF is I²S master at 48 kHz stereo, ESP is slave. Matches the audio_io config in main firmware. The previously-served plain i2s_v1.0.7 was the wrong variant for this carrier (XVF expects ESP-master at 16 kHz; ESP firmware is configured slave-48k). Mute-button-hold DFU mode works for recovery; runtime DFU is preferred.
